subcodes.first_line: My God, the Most Generous, the Most Compassionate! I have turned my face unto Thee, holding fast to the cord of Thy loving-kindness
subcodes.first_line_orig: الها کریما رحیما بتو توجّه نموده‌ام و بحبل عنایتت متمسّکم و بذیل کرمت متشبّث
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for forgiveness, @purpose; goal of creation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @transcendence; unknowability of God
